domain: Cassowary casque low-frequency receiver — 17cm spongy keratin casque hypothesized to tune to species' 23-Hz long-range forest vocalizations.
specific_mechanism: Dedicated structural low-pass receiver that complements the rest of the auditory system, optimized for long-range signal pickup.
llm_application: CASQUE-RECEIVER: explicit low-pass residual-stream branch per layer (alongside the attention branch), tuned to long-range sequence positional content (low-frequency along sequence axis). Forces long-range information to flow via the dedicated low-pass channel rather than via attention sinks.
novelty_claim: Attention sinks (StreamingLLM) emerge naturally as the residual-stream's de-facto low-pass channel. LoFT-LLM applies LLMs to low-freq forecasting. α-entmax adapts sparsity. CASQUE-RECEIVER differs by INTRODUCING an explicit dedicated low-pass residual-stream branch per layer.
